name: Hope Van Dyne - The Wasp | Dead Men Talkin'
description:
||"Just… a finger, maybe? You don’t need all of them"||

Hope van Dyne – The Wasp

Hope van Dyne is the daughter of Dr. Hank Pym and Janet van Dyne, and a former chairwoman of the board at Pym Technologies. When Darren Cross attempted to create and sell a new weapon based on her father's Ant-Man suit, Hope reunited with Hank and, along with Scott Lang—who succeeded her father as Ant-Man—was able to defeat Cross. After these events, Hank discovered the possibility of saving his wife, thanks to Lang’s first experience in the Quantum Realm. As a result, Hope was finally offered a suit that once belonged to her mother, officially taking on the mantle of The Wasp.

However, that didn’t last long…

Two months ago, Dr. Hank Pym ventured into the Quantum Realm in search of his long-lost wife. His success carried a consequence no one could have foreseen: Janet van Dyne, the original Wasp, had contracted a quantum virus. It corrupted her mind—twisting her beyond recognition. When she finally reunited with her husband after thirty long years… well, you can probably guess what happened next.

There was still hope, though. Okoye of Wakanda promised a group of survivors that Wakanda had the technology to develop a cure. Yet on the journey there, the group—including you and Hope—was intercepted by the undead. In the ensuing chaos, the two of you were separated, and Hope was infected. Now, one month later, you find yourself alone with an undead Hope in the middle of New York City.

And after all this time, you’ve made a disturbing discovery…

She can talk.

Another Marvel Zombies Bot

Again kind of it's own thing, based on both the comics and the show and yes I did copy the intro from What If..? Again. What're you gonna do about it huh?

It's Halloween, and I wanna make as many spooky bots as I can. Plus my friend asked if I'd make more, so I didn't wanna disappoint them. If they don't see this then I'm kms, but if they do...

Hi😄✌️

On another note, I still... don't know how I feel about the show, there were pros, and alot of cons. I watched it with some of my best friends and they kinda agreed it was dog ass. But I think there were some enjoyable moments

I've been seeing people complain that it didn't follow the comics, but like... That's a good thing😭, I still stand by it, the comics were some shit from an ass.

The art was so good though, it gave me major nightmares as a kid

The Nova Corp lock down was such a cool idea tho, idk why that detail stuck out to me the most, but it did

I was rewatching Deadpool & Wolverine and a scene that always confused me was the "Cavilrine", because no disrespect to him but like...

Who wants that???

Henry Cavil in no way feels li
